Package net.sf.jstuff.core.types

Class TypeSafeEnum<ID>

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jstuff.core.types.TypeSafeEnum<ID>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public abstract class TypeSafeEnum<ID> extends Object implements Serializable
An implementation of the type safe enum pattern described in Effective Java by Joshua Block.

It allows to compare enumeration objects by reference (==), rather than with .equals(), even if the enums were serialized and deserialized.

Author:
Sebastian Thomschke
See Also:

  • Field Details

    • id

      public final ID id
      the enum's identifier.

    • ordinal

      public final transient int ordinal
      The ordinal is unique in this JVM instance across all instances of sub classes of TypeSafeEnum. It can be used in switch statements.
